title: Forge License Payload (v1.0)
description: The canonical JSON inside .forge/payload.json. The exact serialised bytes are what is signed.

protocol_version.description: Payload schema version. Bump on wire-breaking change.

license_id.description: Globally unique license identifier (snowflake-like, generated by LA).

scope.description: Granularity at which this license is enforced.

bound_fingerprint.description: Required when binding != none. SHA-256 hex of the canonical fingerprint string.

features.description: Boolean / scalar feature toggles; semantics defined per product.

limits.description: Numeric / scalar quota values; semantics defined per product.
